description:
The quiz evaluates developers' proficiency with JavaScript's native Date API, emphasizing its quirks and common pitfalls. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a friendly, encouraging tone that both challenges and educates. The format is multiple‑choice and requires no registration, making it an accessible skill check.
Topics: JavaScript Date object, Date parsing and formatting, Time zones and localization, Common Date API pitfalls, Comparison with third‑party date libraries
Audience: Front‑end developers and JavaScript programmers who have basic experience with dates and want to deepen their understanding of the native Date class.
